headline: 热门新片《奥德赛》领跑本周趋势
headlineEn: Hot New Film 'Odyssey' Leads This Week's Trends
summary: 今日娱乐头条：《奥德赛》与《后室》本周持续霸榜，幸运女神热度不减。本周新片三部，无新片上映今日。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment headlines: 'Odyssey' and 'Backrooms' dominate the weekly chart, with 'Goddess of Luck' still trending. No new releases today, three new films this week.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片《海洋奇缘：启航》跻身周榜
industryHighlights.en: New film 'Moana: Set Sail' enters weekly chart

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将上映受期待
《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》定档在即
industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' sets release date soon
